text.message: Red u going for the 31 port? I was hoping not to have to fight u for it
Robbing the same person over and over is bad business
why is this bot soloing me lol
bc u have the most vps
Lets make a truce not to keep fighting each other
tough if you are going for army
but maybe i can do a temporary truce
Red can I have the 3 1 port
Well, what are you willing to give?
